<mxPoint x="300" y="2604" /> <mxPoint x="300" y="2793" /> </Array> <mxPoint y="-1" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" value="Detailed multi-column data" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.875;exitY=1.016;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, as="points"> <mxPoint x="186" y="2993" /> </Array> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" value="Documentation or instructions" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" value="Yes, show position in range" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, id="24" value="No, just the number" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, id="25" value="Absolute
comparison" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, #ededed);startFill=1;startSize=8;endSize=8;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" source="6" target="12" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="0.2368" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="950" y="2554" /> <mxPoint x="950" y="2473" /> </Array> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="26" value="Share of total" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, #ededed);startFill=1;startSize=8;endSize=8;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" edge="1" source="6" target="13" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="27" value="Multiple values
vs limits" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, #ededed);startFill=1;startSize=8;endSize=8;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" source="6" target="14" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="0.2444" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="950" y="2588" /> <mxPoint x="950" y="2673" /> </Array> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="28" value="No, just overall spread" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.23;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, #ededed);startFill=1;startSize=8;endSize=8;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" edge="1" source="7" target="15" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="29" value="Yes, when density shifts" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.77;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, #ededed);startFill=1;startSize=8;endSize=8;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" edge="1" source="7" target="16" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="0.0228" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
